used: is longer than a year on venus the time it takes to orbit the sun
in the vacuum of space a flame can burn in a spherical shape because the lack of gravity prevents the hot gases from rising
the largest known star uy scuti would extend beyond the orbit of jupiter if placed at the center of our solar system
space is not completely empty a single cubic meter of interstellar space contains on average about one hydrogen atom
galaxies far more than the previously estimated 100 billion
neutron stars are so dense that a sugar cube size amount of their material would weigh about a billion tons on earth
the coldest natural place known in the universe is the boomerang nebula where temperatures drop to 1 kelvin just one degree above absolute zero
astronauts on the international space station see 16 sunrises and 16 sunsets each day because the station orbits earth roughly every 90 minutes
